principle: Clearforge social assets should clearly signal a subject and payoff, but quality imperfections do not block otherwise safe publication.

checks.opening: The safest way to use AI is not to give it the whole job.
What is the real AI workflow upgrade this week?
The most useful AI setups are not the ones with the most automation.
The clearest operational lesson in today’s AI updates is that provenance and approval are becoming part of the workflow.

pinterest.title: AI Workflow Risk Checklist: Draft, Review, Approve, Publish
